summary: W1496 carries the W1495-constructed W722 source-triangulation provider into the W724 source-homological-triangulation provider by using the existing W855/W821 comparison-bijectivity route to supply CategoryWithHomology MetrizableLCA. It proves that both the constructed W724 provider and the W1477-side W724 provider project back to the W1495/W1477 W722 source-triangulation data, records that no new caller-supplied homology-provider input is added, preserves the W1495 74-input ledger, and leaves the final original four-task completion surface nonterminal with productSuccessClaimed=false.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: ProductSuccessDeclarations.lean does not import or check an OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the original four-task contract.
Final imported completion surface remains nonterminal: originalFourTaskContractCompletion.productSuccessClaimed = false still compiles.

W1496 only routes W1495's W722 source-triangulation data through the W855/W821 source-homological construction; it does not prove sourcePretriangulated, sourceTriangulated, triangleCompletion, or the remaining 74 constructor inputs from mathematical data.

Original four mathematical tasks remain open under the positive-witness supplement; the current route still relies on assumed boundary, relation, target-surjectivity, target-compactness, mapped-cokernel, selected-difference, normalized-lift, fixed-target uniqueness, source-triangulation, endpoint, localized-unit, and unit mapping-cone fields rather than a positive product witness.
remaining_work: Continue Lean implementation toward a positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess-style declaration backed by actual exact-category, metrizable LCA exact-category, Yoneda-Ext, and bounded derived infinity-category constructions.

Discharge the W1496/W1495 source-homological, source-pretriangulated, source-triangulated, and triangle-completion fields together with the remaining W1494 constructor inputs, or replace the field-ledger route with an explicit positive witness satisfying the positive-witness supplement.
Before any product-success claim, rerun the source-contradiction gate, negative fixtures, clean checkout verification, root external audit, and clean-extracted packet audit.
